query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, rarity, MIN(base_hp) as min_hp, MAX(base_hp) as max_hp, AVG(base_hp) as avg_hp, MIN(base_attack) as min_atk, MAX(base_attack) as max_atk, AVG(base_attack) as avg_atk, MIN(base_defense) as min_def, MAX(base_defense) as max_def FROM game_monster_catalog WHERE is_active = 1 GROUP BY rarity ORDER BY avg_hp
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, rarity, MIN(base_hp) as min_hp, MAX(base_hp) as max_hp, AVG(base_hp) as avg_hp, MIN(base_attack) as min_atk, MAX(base_attack) as max_atk, AVG(base_attack) as avg_atk, MIN(base_defense) as min_def, MAX(base_defense) as max_def FROM game_monster_catalog WHERE is_active = 1 GROUP BY rarity ORDER BY avg_hp
